statement: In every magma, Equation 1269 (`x = x * (((y * z) * z) * w)`) implies Equation 3875 (`x * x = (x * (y * z)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0282
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y z) z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op y z)) z)
